Removed_Other.name: FFlagDevFrameworkMultiImageRenameFix_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Fixes issues with renaming multiple images in the development framework.
Removed_Other.purpose: Makes it easier for developers to manage and organize their images.

Removed_Interpolation.name: FFlagSmoothClusterGeometryMultipleMutexes_Staged
Removed_Interpolation.mechanism: Uses multiple mutexes to manage geometry in clusters more efficiently.
Removed_Interpolation.purpose: Enhances performance and stability in games with complex geometry.

Removed_Camera/UI.name: FFlagUIBloxAddTestIdToComboButtonAndCellTailDescription_Staged
Removed_Camera/UI.mechanism: Adds a test identifier to combo buttons and cell descriptions for easier testing.
Removed_Camera/UI.purpose: Facilitates better development and testing of UI elements, leading to a smoother player experience.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores the current Git hash of the repository as a dynamic string.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows developers to track changes and versions of the game more effectively.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Allows dynamic strings to include timestamps that can flip based on conditions.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enables more flexible and context-aware text displays in the game.

Added_Security.mechanism: Sets safe limits on minimum and maximum prices for items.
Added_Security.purpose: Protects players from buying or selling items at unreasonable prices.

Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the ad experience for players, making it more relevant and engaging.
